description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 44 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 18 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityTwo main zipped compartments One zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches Two elasticated mesh pockets on the sides for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and graphic printCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
